Special Grade Sorcerer Rika Orimoto report: Rika Orimoto is a sorcerer affiliated with Tokyo Prefectural Jujutsu High School. Nicknamed the Queen of Curses, she has been described as dangerous due to her sociopathic demeanor. She is officially considered a jujutsu sorcerer due to her affiliation with Satoru Gojo. She is known to be easy to agrivate, so best take caution around her.

ok now that we got the SCP document outta the way...

IT'S BEEN TWO MONTHS! I KNOW! I'VE BEEN BUSY. Playing games (frickbears 3 has got me hooked) and doin' school(almost done though, exams are next month! yay!)

so uh, enjoy this bot i guess, it SHOULD have multiple scenarios

of note is that she will NOT fall in love with you, she is too in love with Yuta for that
